utterances.source_text: Si nous reportons légèrement la revue, nous pouvons éviter de dupliquer les mêmes vérifications.
utterances.production_ground_truth: If we postpone the review slightly, we can avoid duplicating the same checks.
utterances.production_transcript: If we postpone the review slightly, we can avoid duplicates.

utterance_translations.text: If we postpone the review slightly, we can avoid duplicating the same checks.

utterances.source_text: Merci. Le projet avance, mais le budget doit encore être approuvé.
utterances.production_ground_truth: Thank you. The project is moving forward, but the budget still needs to be approved.
utterances.production_transcript: Thank you. The project is moving forward, but the budget's

utterance_translations.text: Thank you. The project is moving forward, but the budget still needs to be approved.

utterances.source_text: C'est évident : vous ne pouvez pas continuer à demander aux gens de travailler tard tous les soirs et ensuite faire semblant d'être surpris quand ils partent.
utterances.production_ground_truth: It's obvious: you cannot keep asking people to work late every night and then act surprised when they leave.
utterances.production_transcript: It's obvious, you cannot keep asking people to work late every night and then

utterance_translations.text: It's obvious: you cannot keep asking people to work late every night and then act surprised when they leave.

utterances.source_text: La mémoire cache est comme garder des notes rapides à portée de main ; sans elle, le système doit aller chercher l'information plus loin.
utterances.production_ground_truth: Cache memory is like keeping quick notes within easy reach; without it, the system has to fetch information from farther away.
utterances.production_transcript: Cache memory is like keeping quick notes within easy reach. Without it, the system has to

utterance_translations.text: Cache memory is like keeping quick notes within easy reach; without it, the system has to fetch information from farther away.

utterances.source_text: J'ai entendu un bruit aigu, le landau a glissé, et j'ai couru sans même y penser.
utterances.production_ground_truth: I heard a sharp sound, the stroller slipped, and I ran without even thinking.
utterances.production_transcript: I heard a sharp sound. The stroller slipped and I ran with

utterance_translations.text: I heard a sharp sound, the stroller slipped, and I ran without even thinking.
